title: Silver Pegasus Acquisition announces pricing of $100 million IPO
content:
* Silver Pegasus Acquisition (SPEGU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SPEGU]) announced [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20165309-silver-pegasus-acquisition-corp-announces-pricing-of-100-million-initial-public-offering]on July 14 that it priced its initial public offering of 10,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit.
 	* The units will be listed on the Nasdaq and will trade under the ticker symbol “SPEGU” beginning July 15.
 	* The offering is expected to close on July 16.

MORE ON SILVER PEGASUS ACQUISITION CORP
